hooks.command: if [ -f wrangler.toml ] && grep -q 'main' wrangler.toml; then node -e "const f=require('fs');const t=f.readFileSync('wrangler.toml','utf8');const m=t.match(/main\s*=\s*['\"](.+?)['\"]/);if(m&&!f.existsSync(m[1])){console.warn('[cloudflare-deploy] ADVERTENCIA: el entry point',m[1],'no existe');}" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
